overview.body: This workshop examines inflation drivers and CPI application.

learning_purpose.body: You will explain drivers and apply CPI reasoning.

knowledge_summary.body: Core inflation concepts include demand-pull and cost-push dynamics, evidence-based interpretation of CPI movement, and judgement about competing explanatory claims.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: This workshop examines inflation drivers and CPI application.

sections.heading: Knowledge summary
sections.content: Core inflation concepts include demand-pull and cost-push dynamics, evidence-based interpretation of CPI movement, and judgement about competing explanatory claims.
